title: VDeleteObject Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VDeleteObject (Sequence As String, ObjectName As String)
parameters:
Sequence	String expression containing the name of a vision sequence in the current EPSON RC+ project.

ObjectName	String expression containing the name of a vision object in the current EPSON RC+ project.
description: Deletes a vision object in the current project.
notes: For a complete list of vision properties and how to use them, see the Vision Guide manuals.
see_also:
VCreateObject

VCreateSequence

VDeleteSequence

VDeleteObject Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VDeleteObject("myseq", "myobj")

C# Example:

m_spel.VDeleteObject("myseq", "myobj");
